channel.title: Paper Annotator Updates
channel.description: Signed macOS updates for Paper Annotator.

item.description:
# Paper Annotator 1.1.7
Clean separation between marking problems and strengthening arguments.
- **The selection popup is now purely for sentence problems.** The passage-analysis tools (专家视角 / 矛盾地图 / 研究简报) have left the chip row entirely — the v1.1.5 grouping never actually took effect because the preset API silently stripped their group tag; that projection is now fixed and pinned by a test. - **A dedicated 分析 ▾ menu lives in the reading toolbar** (next to 速扫). Select a passage first, then pick a tool — each entry shows what it does (five-lens pressure test, contradiction mapping, synthesized research brief). Without a selection the menu explains how to use it. The selection stays alive while you interact with the menu. - Analysis presets never become the sticky sweep default, and digit shortcuts skip them — the rapid-marking flow stays uncontaminated.
Requirements: Apple silicon Mac running macOS 10.13 or later.

# Paper Annotator 1.1.6
The full round-trip now runs without ever touching the command line.
- **完成标注 · 生成交接单 opens a copy dialog.** Clicking it writes the batch prompt files (`agent-prompts/*.md`) and pops a dialog: **复制全文** per batch (paste into a chat-only agent like Cloud Codex, one batch at a time) or **复制封面提示词** (a cover prompt listing every file path + output contract, for file-access agents like Claude Code / Codex). Clipboard-denied webviews fall back to a pre-selected textarea for manual ⌘C. - **导入 Agent 结果** — after your agent writes its results to `agent-results/`, the Docket panel shows a one-click **导入 Agent 结果（N 批待回填）** button. It applies each result through the exact same all-or-nothing gate as the CLI `apply-candidates`, then reports per batch: ✓ applied, · already-applied (skipped), ✗ rejected (with reason). The manuscript is never touched; you still review each candidate in 专注模式 and commit explicitly. - Re-running either step is idempotent — nothing is duplicated, and a returned batch is skipped.
Requirements: Apple silicon Mac running macOS 10.13 or later.

# Paper Annotator 1.1.5
Vocabulary honesty release: every control now says exactly what it does.
- **Analysis tools get their own entry.** 专家视角 / 矛盾地图 / 研究简报 are passage-level analysis tasks (five-lens pressure test → contradiction mapping → synthesized brief), not sentence-problem marks — they now live behind a dedicated **分析 ▾** entry at the end of the selection toolbar instead of crowding the marking chips. Digit shortcuts 9/0 still work. - **完成标注 · 生成交接单** — the handoff button no longer implies the app will invoke an agent itself; it writes the handoff summary, nothing more. You hand the generated batch prompt files to Codex / Cloud Codex yourself. - **换说法·查证** — the rephrase chip now states its real contract: candidates must carry verifiable web sources (facts, terminology, collocations). For pure phrasing passes, use 速扫 / 语感 instead.
Requirements: Apple silicon Mac running macOS 10.13 or later.
